name: samil-audit-radar
description: Track Korean companies' external auditors, auditor tenure, and periodic designation timing from OpenDART.

interface.shortDescription: Find auditor tenure and next audit appointment events.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin for SamilPwC-style audit market research. It uses OpenDART public disclosures to identify a company's current auditor, recent auditor history, consecutive auditor tenure, and likely periodic designation or free-appointment timing.
defaultPrompt: OpenDART 기반 감사인 지정 타이밍을 분석해줘.
